UnitAbilities.Title: Abbess Sanctorum
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Righteous Repugnance
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of Fidelis and the Lance of Illumination. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by this model, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

Options: power weapon, plasma pistol and rod of office
hallowed chainsword and brazier of holy fire

WargearDefinitions.Key: power weapon, plasma pistol and rod of office

UnitAbilities.Title: Null Rod
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rod of Office
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Command
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Emperor’s Grace
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

Weapons.Name: Condemnor boltgun
Weapons.Keywords: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

UnitAbilities.Title: Fury of the Righteous
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rapturous Blows
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, then until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack made by this model scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Pulpit of Saint Holline’s Basilica
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fiery Conviction
UnitAbilities.Text:
If this model is on the battlefield at the start of your Command phase, you can choose one of the following:
	▪ Discard 1 Miracle dice and gain 1CP.
	▪ Take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, gain 1CP.

Abilities.AbilityId: The Pulpit of Saint Holline’s Basilica

UnitAbilities.Title: Healing Tears
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Celestine model, in your Command phase, if this unit is below its Starting Strength, either one destroyed Geminae Superia model or up to D3 other Bodyguard models are returned to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lifewards
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains one or more Geminae Superia models, Celestine has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Miraculous Intervention
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this unit’s Celestine model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Relics of the Matriarchs
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Solemn Procession
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, the Attacks characteristics of all of its weapons are halved, and you can only select one ability when using its Relics of the Matriarchs ability, instead of up to two.

Sections.Title: The Fiery Heart (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit’s Move characteristic and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

Sections.Title: Simulacrum of the Argent Shroud (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Sections.Title: Censer of the Sacred Rose (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

Sections.Title: Icon of the Valorous Heart (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

Sections.Title: Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice (Aura):
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.

Sections.Title: Petals of the Bloody Rose (Aura):
Sections.Text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Holy Judgement
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this unit’s Ephrael Stern model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is a Chaos unit. If the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mysterious Saviours
UnitAbilities.Text:
You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once the Cherub ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Defenders of the Faith
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Weapons.Name: Condemnor boltgun
Weapons.Keywords: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Impetuous Fervour
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor’s Judgement
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Agathe Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

Abilities.AbilityId: Recount the Deeds of the Saints

UnitAbilities.Title: Litany of Deeds
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you gain a Miracle dice as the result of an Adepta Sororitas unit or model from your army being destroyed, if that unit or model was destroyed within 12" of this model, you can re-roll the result of that Miracle dice before adding it to your Miracle Dice pool.

UnitAbilities.Title: Stanchion of Holy Martyrs
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Save characteristic of 2+ and a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Laud Hailer
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adepta Sororitas unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Stirring Rhetoric
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Righteous Smiting
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Zealot
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

Infos.Title: HOLY MISSION
Infos.Text: If this model is attached to a Dominion Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Scouts 6" ability. If this model is attached to a Sisters Novitiate Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Infiltrators ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sworn Protectors
UnitAbilities.Text: While an Adepta Sororitas Character is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Medicus Ministorum
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Healing
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit. If you wish, you can first discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to that unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Executioner of Heretics (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unflinching Determination
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Righteous Paragons
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Overseer of Redemption
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Repentia Superior model, each time a Sisters Repentia model in this unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once the Cherub ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Righteous Awareness
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units it can make a Normal move of up to D6”.

UnitAbilities.Title: Holy Vanguard
UnitAbilities.Text: If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step and this unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, that Leader unit gains the Scouts 6" ability.

Weapons.Name: Condemnor boltgun
Weapons.Keywords: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

UnitAbilities.Title: Angelic Ascent
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Embodied Prophecy
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:
▪ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
▪ [LETHAL HITS]
If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherubs
UnitAbilities.Text: Twice per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place two Cherub tokens next to the unit, removing one each time the Cherubs ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm of Retribution
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, that model can re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If such an attack targets an enemy unit that has destroyed one or more Adepta Sororitas units from your army during the battle, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Weapons.Name: Condemnor boltgun
Weapons.Keywords: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

UnitAbilities.Title: Anchorite Sarcophagus
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 7" and a Save characteristic of 3+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Anguish of the Unredeemed
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

UnitAbilities.Title: Endless Suffering
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Devastating Refrain
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time such an attack destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that models Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of on a 6.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Castigation
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

UnitAbilities.Title: Purge and Cleanse
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Battle Sisters Squad, Dominion Squad or Sisters Novitiate Squad from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this Transport; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Extremis Trigger Word
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Options: Ministorum hand flamer and power weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Command
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Divine Deliverance
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Options: close combat weapon and simulacrum imperialis
ministorum hand flamer and close combat weapon

WargearDefinitions.Key: close combat weapon and simulacrum imperialis

UnitAbilities.Title: Ministorum Sermon
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Ministorum Priest, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

UnitAbilities.Title: Salvationist Medikit
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Ministorum Priest from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a Ministorum Priest from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rituale Nullificatus
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Virtue of Intolerance
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets its quarry, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability and you can re-roll the Hit roll. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a Transport.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Denuncia Oratory
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army can be attached to a Dominion Squad unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Righteous Denunciation
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Judged for Execution
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Rule.Title: ANGELIC JUDGEMENT
Rule.Text:
Friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly units have the following ability:

Condemnatory Psalms: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is condemned:
▪ While a unit is condemned, that unit has +3" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Inspirational Battle Canticles
Stratagems.Category: CHORUS OF CONDEMNATION
Stratagems.When: Start of the Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly unit or one friendly Exorcist unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one friendly battle‑shocked Adepta Sororitas unit within 6" of your unit. That unit is no longer battle‑shocked.

Stratagems.Name: Harmonised Exorcism
Stratagems.Category: CHORUS OF CONDEMNATION
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Exorcist unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Exorcist unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one unit visible to and within 9" of a friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that unit have +1 to hit rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Devastating Reprise
Stratagems.Category: CHORUS OF CONDEMNATION
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Exorcist unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding Monster/Vehicle units) hit by those ranged attacks. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that unit have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

Enhancements.Name: Clarion of Urgency
Enhancements.Description: Canoness With Jump Pack model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is unengaged, you can place this unit in strategic reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Symphonic Payload
Enhancements.Description: Exorcist unit only. This unit can re‑roll rolls to determine the A of a weapon.

AddedAbilities.Title: Condemnatory Psalms
AddedAbilities.Text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is condemned:
▪ While a unit is condemned, that unit has +3" detection range.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the REVEREND tag and cannot be taken with another REVEREND detachment.
Rule.Title: HOLY QUEST
Rule.Text: Friendly Celestian Sacresants units’ attacks have +1 BS and WS.

Stratagems.Name: Sanctified Blows
Stratagems.Category: SACRED CHAMPIONS
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Celestian Sacresants unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A and S.

Stratagems.Name: Faithful Fortitude
Stratagems.Category: SACRED CHAMPIONS
Stratagems.When: Any phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit suffers a mortal wound.
Stratagems.Target: That Celestian Sacresants unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds until the end of the phase.

Stratagems.Name: Unflinching Determination
Stratagems.Category: SACRED CHAMPIONS
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit is selected to make an advance/fall‑back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Celestian Sacresants unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
▪ Your unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
▪ That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot/declare a charge.

Enhancements.Name: Writ of Compunction
Enhancements.Description: Celestian Sacresants unit only. This unit has +1 OC.

Enhancements.Name: Perfervid Haste
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. This unit has +1" M.

Rule.Title: HYMNS OF BATTLE
Rule.Text:
▪ Enhancements selected from this detachment do not count towards the total number of enhancements in your army.
▪ Friendly Adepta Sororitas Character units have +1 Ld.

Enhancements.Name: Hagiomnifex
Enhancements.Description:
Adepta Sororitas Character unit only (excluding Penitent units). (Once per turn, per unit) At the start of a phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the abilities below:
▪ Rite of Revelation: While this unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range.
▪ Sermon of Intolerance: This unit’s battle‑shock rolls automatically succeed.
▪ Catechism of Raging Fervour: This unit has +1" M.
▪ Psalm of Righteous Smiting: This unit’s attacks have +1 S.
▪ Chorus of Repudiation: Attacks that target this unit with a S greater than this unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.

Rule.Title: The Blood of Martyrs
Rule.Text: Each time an Adepta Sororitas model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength.

Stratagems.Name: Praise the Fallen
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Stratagems.Name: Divine Intervention
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas Character unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model is set back up with that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds).
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select Saint Celestine as the target of this Stratagem. You cannot select the same Character as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: Righteous Vengeance
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and, if your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Sanctified Immolation
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas Vehicle model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

Stratagems.Name: Spirit of the Martyr
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Suffering and Sacrifice
Stratagems.Category: HALLOWED MARTYRS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas Infantry or Adepta Sororitas Walker unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

Enhancements.Name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll 1 Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool showing the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

Enhancements.Name: Saintly Example
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

Enhancements.Name: Through Suffering, Strength
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: Mantle of Ophelia
Enhancements.Description: Canoness or Palatine model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

Rule.Title: Desperate for Redemption
Rule.Text:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the following Vows of Atonement to be active for your army until the start of the next battle round. You can only select each Vow of Atonement once per battle.

The Path of the Penitent
Add 3" to the Move characteristic of Penitent models from your army.

Absolution in Battle
Each time a unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by Penitent models in that unit.

Death Before Disgrace
Each time a Penitent model from your army is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Final Redemption
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Penitent unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Stratagems.Name: Purity of Suffering
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Penitent unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, Penitent models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: Passion of the Penitent
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Penitent unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a Penitent model in your unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Lash of Guilt
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just before a Penitent unit from your army Advances.
Stratagems.Target: That Penitent unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the Penitent Engines keyword, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Boundless Zeal
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Adepta Sororitas unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the Penitent keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

Stratagems.Name: Devout Fanaticism
Stratagems.Category: PENITENT HOST - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Penitent unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
Enhancements.Description: Penitent model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

Enhancements.Name: Verse of Holy Piety
Enhancements.Description: Penitent model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement (see the Desperate for Redemption detachment rule). Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

Enhancements.Name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
Enhancements.Description: Canoness, Palatine or Ministorum Priest model only. The bearer gains the Penitent keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a Repentia Squad unit.

Enhancements.Name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a Penitent unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice then gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

Rule.Title: Fervent Purgation
Rule.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by Adepta Sororitas models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 6", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Shield of Aversion
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Righteous Blows
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of attacks made by those weapons this phase, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Cleansing Flames
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Rites of Fire
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that disembarked from a Transport this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 6" that is also within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Blazing Ire
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas Transport unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: One unit embarked within your Transport can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Stratagems.Name: Carry Forth the Faithful
Stratagems.Category: BRINGERS OF FLAME - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just before an Adepta Sororitas Transport model from your army Advances.
Stratagems.Target: That Adepta Sororitas Transport model.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your Transport, and units can disembark from your Transport even though it Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Righteous Rage
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

Enhancements.Name: Manual of Saint Griselda
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you just discarded (to a maximum of 6).

Enhancements.Name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
Enhancements.Description: Canoness or Palatine model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Fire and Fury
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Rule.Title: Sacred Rites
Rule.Text: Each Adepta Sororitas unit from your army can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of just one.

Stratagems.Name: Light of the Emperor
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is blessed. While a unit is blessed, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws). If your unit has the Jump Pack keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

Stratagems.Name: Faith and Fury
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of your unit’s attacks this phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Stratagems.Name: Shield of Faith
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.
Stratagems.Target: That Adepta Sororitas unit, or one friendly Adepta Sororitas Jump Pack unit within 3" of it.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds. If you targeted an Adepta Sororitas Jump Pack unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is unit is within 3" of your unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Blinding Radiance
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, or one friendly Adepta Sororitas Jump Pack unit within 3" of such a unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If you targeted an Adepta Sororitas Jump Pack unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Divine Guidance
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Stratagems.Name: Angelic Descent
Stratagems.Category: ARMY OF FAITH - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas Jump Pack unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place to into Strategic Reserves.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Divine Aspect
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Enhancements.Name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

Enhancements.Name: Litanies of Faith
Enhancements.Description: Canoness or Palatine model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Enhancements.Name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models are destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Rule.Title: RIGHTEOUS PURPOSE
Rule.Text:
In your Command phase, you can select up to 3 Adepta Sororitas units from your army (including units that are embarked within Transports), until the start of your next Command phase, those units are Righteous. While a unit is Righteous:
	▪ Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
	▪ Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.
	▪ Improve the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by Battle Sisters Squad, Celestian Sacresants and Paragon Warsuits models in that unit by 1.

KEYWORDS
While a Celestian Sacresants unit from your army is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Celestian Sacresants models in that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Shield of Denial
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army.
Stratagems.Target: That Adepta Sororitas unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds instead.

Stratagems.Name: Suffer Not The Unfaithful
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that is Righteous and that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

Stratagems.Name: To The Heart of Heresy
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Path of The Righteous
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, if your unit is Righteous, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Bastion of Faith
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Celestian Sacresants unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. In addition, if your unit is Righteous, you can select one other Celestian Sacresants unit from your army that is not Battle‑shocked and is within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that Celestian Sacresants unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Indefatigable Dedication
Stratagems.Category: CHAMPIONS OF FAITH - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Adepta Sororitas unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

Enhancements.Name: Triptych of Judgement
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Mark of Devotion
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: Eyes of The Oracle
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Sanctified Amulet
Enhancements.Description: Adepta Sororitas model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

ArmyRules.Title: ACTS OF FAITH
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Adepta Sororitas, each unit from your army with this ability can perform one Act of Faith per phase. This is done using Miracle dice. 

GAINING MIRACLE DICE
If your Army Faction is Adepta Sororitas, you gain 1 Miracle dice:
▪ At the start of each battle round.
▪ Each time an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army is destroyed.
Each time you gain a Miracle dice, roll one D6. The number you roll is the value of that Miracle dice. This value cannot be changed or re-rolled, unless a rule specifically states otherwise. Keep your Miracle dice to one side – this is your Miracle dice pool.

PERFORMING AN ACT OF FAITH
Before making a dice roll for a model or unit from your army with the Acts of Faith ability, if you have one or more dice in your Miracle dice pool, that unit can perform an Act of Faith. If it does, select one of the dice from your Miracle dice pool to substitute that dice roll (if a roll involves more than one dice, e.g. a Charge roll or Battle-shock test, only a single dice can be substituted). The dice that is being substituted is not rolled; instead the value of the selected Miracle dice is used as if it had been rolled (this counts as an unmodified dice roll of that value for all rules purposes). Each Miracle dice can only be selected for substitution once. Once all Miracle dice substitutions have been made, remove the chosen Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool, and roll all remaining, unsubstituted dice that are a part of the dice roll. You can use Miracle dice when a unit performs an Act of Faith for any of the following types of dice roll: 
	▪ Advance roll 
	▪ Battle-shock test 
	▪ Charge roll 
	▪ Damage roll 
	▪ Hit roll 
	▪ Saving throw 
	▪ Wound roll 

Example: Instead of rolling 2D6 to take a unit’s Battle-shock test, you could use one dice from your Miracle dice pool. If the value of that dice was 4, the unit’s Battle-shock test would be determined by rolling one D6 and adding 4 to it (i.e. it would be D6+4).
